title: Figure 2 from: Błaszkowski J, Zubek S, Milczarski P, Malinowski R, Niezgoda P, Goto BT (2025) New taxa and a combination in Glomerales (Glomeromycota, Glomeromycetes). MycoKeys 112: 253-276. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.112.136158
author: Błaszkowski, Janusz
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Dominikia paraminutaA–C cluster of spores (sp) with subtending hypha (sh), and sterile hyphae (sth) D–G spore wall layers (swl) 1–3 continuous with subtending hyphal wall layers (shwl) 1–3; septum (s) connecting the inner surfaces of shwl2 is indicated in G, H arbuscule (a), vesicle (v), and coiled hyphae (c) in mycorrhizal root of Plantago lanceolata stained in 0.1% Trypan blue C, D, H spores and mycorrhizal structures in PVLGE, F, G spores in PVLG+Melzer's reagent A, B scanning electron microscopy C–H differential interference microscopy. Scale bars: 20 μm (A); 20 μm (B); 10 μm (C–H).
